videos.headline: Ohio State goes back up two TDs with Barrett's run
videos.description: After a 91-yard kickoff return set Ohio State up with excellent field position, J.T. Barrett keeps it and runs in the touchdown from five yards out to give the Buckeyes a 24-10 lead over Indiana.

videos.headline: Ohio State handles Indiana
videos.description: J.T. Barrett rushes for 137 yards and a score in No. 2 Ohio State's 38-17 win over Indiana.
